stagedChanges.summary: Reconcile stale May/early-June next-action language in lane summaries against the refreshed Jun 22 export.
stagedChanges.why: The open to-do list now carries current Jun 23-28 execution dates, while several lane summary rows still mention May 18, May 20, May 28, or Jun 15 as active next actions.
stagedChanges.note: Safe to auto-apply only as wording cleanup if Gus agrees the refreshed export should be treated as the source of truth.

stagedChanges.summary: Align workshop lane text with the refreshed tracker statuses and dates.
stagedChanges.why: Org Summit is now `done` / `follow-up` in the export but the lane text still says scheduled; MCO still references a Jun 12 next meeting while the current to-do says Jun 24; Pharmacy lane still mentions Jun 16 even though active tracker rows are Jun 25.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval because this changes visible interpretation of workshop stage text, even though it appears to be cleanup.

stagedChanges.summary: Decide whether SmartRX and AI Hub V1 should remain active lane items or be reframed as follow-on work.
stagedChanges.why: The refreshed export marks the old SmartRX May 18 check and AI Hub V1 curriculum build as done, but related open lane rows still describe them as active project work.
stagedChanges.note: Needs Gus approval because this may be real continuing work rather than stale dashboard residue.
